bullets: Thirty-one Christians in China, including an elderly leader, imprisoned for peaceful worship and Bible study in one of the largest coordinated prosecutions in recent years.
Christian worshippers in Indonesia, including children and elderly members, traumatized after an extremist mob violently disrupted their service and forced them from their meeting place.
Civilians in Gaza — over 900 killed and nearly all of the population displaced — amid collapsed ceasefire terms, expanding military control, and stalled peace negotiations.

Civilians across Lebanon — more than 3,200 killed, one million displaced, and children among the dead and injured — amid intensifying airstrikes, advancing ground forces, and a deepening humanitarian crisis.
Sixteen girls killed and dozens injured in Kenya after a deliberately set fire destroyed a boarding school dormitory in the early morning hours.
Civilians across Ukraine enduring large-scale strikes amid United Nations warnings that the war risks spiraling into a wider and more devastating conflict.
Civilians in Sudan — including elderly residents killed in villages during a religious holiday — amid ongoing civil war, armed group attacks, and worsening famine conditions.

Communities in eastern DR Congo and neighboring Uganda amid a rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak exceeding 1,000 suspected cases and hundreds of deaths, worsened by ongoing armed conflict limiting health response.
Farmers and stranded communities in eastern Syria after the Euphrates River flooded, collapsing a bridge and cutting off access to affected areas.
Residents near an active volcano in Indonesia living under an exclusion zone as renewed eruptions send ash columns kilometers into the sky.
Farmers across large parts of Australia facing a devastating mouse plague destroying crops and invading homes, threatening livelihoods and food production.
Gold seekers and rescue teams in Laos after flash floods trapped miners inside a narrow cave system, with two people still unaccounted for.
Millions of residents across Japan exposed to dangerous winds, heavy rainfall, and flooding from a Category 1 typhoon.
Communities in Papua New Guinea and Fiji on alert following a series of moderate earthquakes in a highly seismically active region.
